concept: Agent Feed - Supervising Autonomous Agents in Power Apps
description: Agent Feed makes Power Apps a central hub for human-agent collaboration by showing a complete activity feed of autonomous Copilot Studio agents, with to-do items for human intervention.

key_capabilities.description: See all agent actions across multiple agents in one side panel
key_capabilities.location: Top of site map in model-driven app

key_capabilities.description: View activity from specific agents or all agents
key_capabilities.use_case: Filter to see only claim evaluation agent activities

key_capabilities.description: Click any record in activity feed to open directly in app
key_capabilities.example: Click claim record to review and approve/reject

key_capabilities.description: Full detail of every action agent took for each activity
Mark tasks as complete after human intervention

steps: Add columns via Copilot (claim status, expense category)

phase_3_agent_creation.description: Build autonomous agent in Copilot Studio
steps: Add data source as knowledge (claims table)

phase_4_triggers.customization: Specify exact data passed to agent (row ID, title, amount)

steps: Go to Agents → Agent Feed in app designer
Add published autonomous agents to feed
Refresh app to see feed in site map

instructions.example: Approve if amount < $500 and supports health, not office equipment

option_set_handling.description: Working with Dataverse choice columns in agent tools
option_set_handling.concept: Option sets are key-value pairs where number correlates to value

configuration.example: If approved, put 1. If rejected, put 2.

escalation_trigger.description: Configure agent to request human help
escalation_trigger.example: Set claim to unknown if title too vague or health benefit unclear

human_resolution.description: User takes action via Agent Feed
steps: See to-do item in Agent Feed
Click record to open in app

agent_flow_customization.default_behavior: Sends entire record body to agent

key_quotes.quote: Agent feed in Power Apps makes apps a central hub for human agent collaboration by showing a complete activity feed of what agents do for them wherever they are in the app.
key_quotes.significance: Core value proposition of Agent Feed

key_quotes.quote: To-do shows actions that need our attention like those that have failed, completed with errors or are waiting for our input.
Claim status is a choice column. This is the concept of option sets in data versse. You can think about these as key value pairs.

limitations: Agent Feed appears in model-driven apps only
Human escalation requires careful instruction design
